customer_name: Patricia L. Zerbini and Anthony G. Thomas
site_name: Patricia L. Zerbini and Anthony G. Thomas

citations.desc: Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries.
citations.narrative:
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 12:30 PM on April
16, 2026. The inspector made contact with the licensee by phone and determined that they were not available. Failure to
provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued
failure to provide access is serious and may result in enforcement action.
End Section

narrative:
2.126(b) 
   
Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries. 
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 12:30 PM on April 
16, 2026. The inspector made contact with the licensee by phone and determined that they were not available. Failure to 
provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued 
failure to provide access is serious and may result in enforcement action. 
 
 
End Section
